diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,158 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Entry point class that extends HonoBase, providing default router configuration with SmartRouter wrapping RegExpRouter and TrieRouter
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions
+- Simple note: 34 lines, declares Hono constructor that sets up router
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base class for Hono framework providing routing, request handling, and HTTP method delegation
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, Context, Router, compose, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, COMPOSED_HANDLER, RouterRoute
+- Simple note: 545 lines, core routing logic with #dispatch, #addRoute, .route, .basePath, .onError, .notFound, .mount, .fetch, .request, .fire methods
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index exporting PatternRouter from router implementation
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines, single export statement
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Pattern-based router using compiled regular expressions for route matching
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route type, emptyParams, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, add (compiles paths to regex), match (executes regex matching)
+- Simple note: 60 lines, converts paths to regex patterns at add time
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index exporting LinearRouter from router implementation
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines, single export statement
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Linear router that stores all routes and checks each one at match time
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, checkOptionalParameter, emptyParams, splitPathRe, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, add (stores routes), match (iterates routes linearly)
+- Simple note: 144 lines, exhaustive matching with complex parameter extraction
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index exporting RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: 7 lines, dual export for runtime and serialization
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: High-performance router using trie-based construction with pre-built regex
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, findMiddleware, nullMatcher, wildcardRegExpCache, Trie
+- Simple note: 252 lines, two-phase approach: build at add time, match at runtime
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Matcher interface definition and implementation for runtime matching against built patterns
+- Names noticed: match, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, emptyParam
+- Simple note: 33 lines, tries static match first then regex match
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node structure with children nodes, method handlers, and patterns for reg-exp-router
+- Names noticed: Node, Context, PATH_ERROR, ParamAssocArray, insert (builds trie), buildRegExpStr (generates regex)
+- Simple note: 162 lines, trie implementation with sort order for matching efficiency
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Pre-built router class optimized for production use via serialized constructor
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, add (adds handlers), buildAllMatchers, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: 165 lines, supports serialization for portable router state
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie data structure for organizing routes and generating regex patterns
+- Names noticed: Trie, Node, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap, insert (processes path), buildRegExp (creates regex)
+- Simple note: 74 lines, converts paths to regex using capture groups
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index exporting SmartRouter from router implementation
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines, single export statement
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Adaptive router that delegates to other routers (RegExpRouter, TrieRouter) and optimizes on matches
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, Router type, add (routes to router), match (delegates and optimizes), activeRouter
+- Simple note: 70 lines, smart routing decision with router selection
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index exporting TrieRouter from router implementation
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines, single export statement
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Trie-based router organizing routes as tree for fast lookup
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, checkOptionalParameter, insert (builds trie), match (trie search)
+- Simple note: 28 lines, tree traversal for matching
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node implementation with methods map, children tree, and pattern matching
+- Names noticed: Node, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, emptyParams, hasChildren, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, insert (builds node), search (finds matches), #pushHandlerSets
+- Simple note: 234 lines, complex node with pattern matching and handler sets
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test utilities and common test cases for all router implementations
+- Names noticed: runTest, RunnerTestSuite, getSuiteHierarchy, Match, beforeEach, expect, describe, it
+- Simple note: 882 lines, comprehensive test suite hierarchy with parameterized tests
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: PatternRouter specific tests covering edge cases like duplicate params and trailing slashes
+- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, PatternRouter, runTest, describe, it, expect, beforeEach
+- Simple note: 42 lines, focused tests for PatternRouter limitations
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: LinearRouter tests for supported edge cases and known limitations
+- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, LinearRouter, runTest, describe, it, expect, beforeEach
+- Simple note: 69 lines, tests with skip for unsupported patterns like multi-match params
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter tests for regex-based pattern matching and unsupported cases
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, describe, it, expect, beforeEach
+- Simple note: 141 lines, tests regex matching with return type verification
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: SmartRouter wrapper tests delegating to RegExpRouter and TrieRouter
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest, describe, it, expect
+- Simple note: 13 lines, delegates all common tests to underlying routers
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter tests verifying tree-based routing functionality
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, describe, it, expect
+- Simple note: 8 lines, runs all common cases via TrieRouter
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Node-level tests for trie operations including search, insert, and edge cases
+- Names noticed: Node, insert, search, describe, it, expect
+- Simple note: 816 lines, exhaustive node tests for all routing scenarios
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+### pattern-router
+- PatternRouter (src/router/pattern-router/router.ts)
+- Module export (src/router/pattern-router/index.ts)
+- Pattern-based matching via compiled regex
+- Limited to simple patterns (no complex regex)
+
+### linear-router
+- LinearRouter (src/router/linear-router/router.ts)
+- Module export (src/router/linear-router/index.ts)
+- Linear matching via exhaustive route checking
+- Supports all patterns including complex regex in labels
+
+### reg-exp-router
+- RegExpRouter (src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts)
+- Matcher interface (src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts)
+- Trie node structure (src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts)
+- Trie data structure (src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts)
+- Prepared version (src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts)
+- Module export (src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts)
+- Build phase creates trie then compiles to regex
+- Runtime phase matches against pre-built regex
+
+### smart-router
+- SmartRouter (src/router/smart-router/router.ts)
+- Module export (src/router/smart-router/index.ts)
+- Delegates to RegExpRouter or TrieRouter based on usage
+- Optimizes router selection after first matching phase
+
+### trie-router
+- TrieRouter (src/router/trie-router/router.ts)
+- Node implementation (src/router/trie-router/node.ts)
+- Module export (src/router/trie-router/index.ts)
+- Tree-based matching for fast lookup
+- Supports parameter reuse and multiple matches
